name: design-review
description: Design quality pipeline that turns a design prompt library into structured brief, context, prototype evidence, accessibility, visual quality, and release gates.

stages.name: catalog_design_skills
review_focus: Every upstream Codex skill is represented exactly once
The design review run consumes the corpus as source-map context, not as a global prompt

stages.name: scope_design
review_focus: Audience, surface, primary goal, and constraints are explicit
Design work starts from available context instead of invented style

stages.name: extract_design_context
review_focus: Tokens are traced to provided sources or declared as gaps
Reusable components and interaction patterns are inventoried

stages.name: prototype_surface
review_focus: Prototype evidence names the medium and interactive states
Render checks are explicit instead of assumed

stages.name: accessibility_audit
review_focus: WCAG AA blockers are not marked as pass
Contrast, semantics, keyboard/focus, motion, and forms are all covered

stages.name: visual_quality_gate
review_focus: AI-template tropes are recorded and fixed
Hierarchy, rhythm, and interaction states are explicit

stages.name: design_release_gate
review_focus: A ready design has passing accessibility and visual quality gates
Attribution and open decisions are preserved
